findings.location: s1 — 日付オブジェクト変換 コード例
findings.description: The source includes a usage example for `getDate` (`DateUtil.getDate(updateDateStr); // -> java.util.Dateオブジェクト`), but no code example for `getDate` appears in the knowledge file's code block. All other methods have at least one code example.

findings.location: s1 — 日数の加減算 コード例 / getDays
findings.description: The source's `getDays` examples include a same-day case demonstrating the return value of 0 (`DateUtil.getDate("20110302", "20110302"); // -> 0`). The knowledge file omits this case, even though the table description mentions it.
findings.source_evidence:
// 同日を指定した場合
DateUtil.getDate("20110302", "20110302"); // -> 0

findings.location: s1 — 月数の加減算 コード例 / addMonth
findings.description: The source shows subtraction examples for `addMonth` (both yyyyMMdd and yyyyMM forms), but the knowledge file's code block only shows addition examples. The subtraction behavior for month-only format (`addMonth("20110302", -1) // -> 20110202`) is not shown.

findings.location: s1 — 日付間の月数取得 コード例 / getMonths
findings.description: The source provides extensive `getMonths` examples covering: (1) same-day/same-month returning 0, (2) yyyyMM format pairs, and (3) mixed yyyyMMdd/yyyyMM format across the two parameters. The knowledge file only includes yyyyMMdd examples. The mixed-format examples in particular demonstrate explicit cross-format compatibility (`DateUtil.getMonths("20110331", "201104") // -> 1` and `DateUtil.getMonths("201103", "20100315") // -> -12`).
